description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — 3 sprints vers prototype jouable. Completed tasks in completed_archive.json.

sprints.S1: CORE LOOP JOUABLE — 1 run complete start-to-end sans crash
sprints.S2: CONTENU & SYSTEMES — 8 biomes, 45 verbes, MOS convergence
sprints.S3: POLISH & EDGE CASES — Stabilite, robustesse LLM

tasks.title: FIX CRITICAL: Supprimer double increment cards_played dans resolve_card()
tasks.description: MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() ligne 483 incremente run_state['cards_played'] ET store_run.gd ligne 146 incremente encore (double incrément — run_state est une reference a store.state['run'] en GDScript 4). Fix: supprimer lignes 482-483 dans merlin_card_system.gd (card_index et cards_played increments). Garder uniquement l'incrément dans StoreRun.resolve_choice(). Sans ce fix, le MOS hard_max de 50 se declenche a ~25 vraies cartes.

tasks.title: FIX HIGH: Supprimer process_card() orphelin + ajouter pacing recovery dans StoreRun
tasks.description: MerlinEffectEngine.process_card() (lignes 71-256) est un pipeline 12-etapes jamais appele dans le flow principal. Supprimer process_card() entierement. Ajouter les etapes manquantes dans StoreRun.resolve_choice(): (1) pacing recovery +5 HP si life>0 ET life<20 apres effets, (2) promise deadline countdown (deja present via check_promise_deadlines). Le drain est supprime (decision directeur q-001). Cooldown deja gere via StoreOghams.tick_cooldowns().

tasks.title: Supprimer dead code merlin_constants.gd (ELEMENTS, ESSENCE_*, FLUX_*)
tasks.description: Phase 0: Supprimer ELEMENTS (14), ESSENCE_DROP_*, ESSENCE_ANCHOR_CARDS, ESSENCE_BASE_REWARDS, ESSENCE_VICTORY_BONUS, ESSENCE_CHUTE_BONUS, ESSENCE_MINIGAME_BONUS, ESSENCE_OGHAM_BONUS, ESSENCE_FACTION_BONUS, FLUX_*, RUN_TYPOLOGIES, DC_BASE, DC_DIFFICULTY_LABELS, ARCHETYPE_DC_BONUS, BOND_TIERS, OGHAM_STARTER_SKILLS, CardOption enum. validate.bat apres.

tasks.title: Nettoyer merlin_store.gd dead state (essence, bestiole, ogham_fragments)
tasks.description: Phase 0: Supprimer meta state keys: essence{14}, ogham_fragments, liens, gloire_points, bestiole_evolution. Renommer _init_triade_run -> _init_run, _resolve_triade_choice -> _resolve_choice, etc.

tasks.title: Renommer TRIADE_ action dispatch prefix dans store + callers
tasks.description: Phase 0: Renommer TRIADE_START_RUN->START_RUN, TRIADE_GET_CARD->GET_CARD, TRIADE_RESOLVE_CHOICE->RESOLVE_CHOICE, etc. Dans tous les callers.

tasks.title: Aligner 18 Oghams sur bible v2.4 (7 effets incorrects)
tasks.description: Phase 1A: Corriger duir->heal_immediate(12), onn->add_biome_currency(10), nuin->replace_worst_option, quert->heal_immediate(8), ruis->heal_and_cost(+18PV,-5monnaie), saille->currency_and_heal(+8,+3). Tous 18 Oghams avec 10 champs obligatoires.

tasks.title: Validation LLM: generer 10 cartes, valider JSON + effets
tasks.description: Generer 10 cartes via LLM (Qwen 3.5). Valider: JSON structure matches adapter, effets applicables sans crash, fallback fonctionne si LLM timeout, JSON repair gere les malformations. Rapport dans test_reports/.

tasks.title: Ajouter 8 biomes avec seuils maturite et EFFECT_CAPS
tasks.description: Phase 1B+1C: Ajouter BIOMES dict (8 biomes: name, subtitle, season, difficulty, maturity_threshold, oghams_affinity, currency_name, card_interval_range, pnj, arc). Ajouter BIOME_MATURITY_THRESHOLDS, MATURITY_WEIGHTS, EFFECT_CAPS, MULTIPLIER_TABLE, ANAM_REWARDS, TALENT_TIERS.

tasks.title: Ajouter 45 verbes d'action + MOS config + Trust tiers
tasks.description: Phase 1D+1F: Ajouter ACTION_VERBS (8 champs + neutre, 45 verbes), FIELD_MINIGAMES mapping. Ajouter MOS_CONVERGENCE, TRUST_TIERS, TRUST_DELTAS, IN_GAME_PERIODS.

tasks.title: Clean merlin_card_system.gd (GAUGES, bestiole)
tasks.description: Supprimer GAUGES const, gauge init, _get_critical_gauges(), gauge effects, bestiole context, _get_bestiole_modifier().

tasks.title: Supprimer 5 dead files (bestiole, souffle HUD, D20)
tasks.description: Supprimer entierement les fichiers de systemes morts. Verifier existence avant suppression.

tasks.title: Bible audit + bug hunt statique (8 fichiers core)
tasks.description: Audit code vs GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md v2.4. Verifier 12 systemes. Analyse statique: null/invalid access, type mismatches, state machine bugs. Rapport dans test_reports/.

tasks.title: 10 scenarios de mort + edge cases
tasks.description: Simuler: vie=0 pendant effet, toutes factions a 0/100, Ogham sans ressources, MOS hard max, save mid-run, Confiance T0->T3, FastRoute champs manquants, multiplicateur cap x2.0.

tasks.title: Bug hunt layer IA (timeout, fallback, race conditions)
tasks.description: Analyse statique IA: timeout LLM non gere (softlock), JSON malforme, fallback si Ollama down, race condition multi-brain, contexte RAG overflow, prompt injection.
